title: Add cross-backend and edge-case test suites
description: PRD and DBB gaps: tests/cross-backend.test.js and tests/edge-cases.test.js are missing. Create both test files covering: (1) cross-backend: same operations across all backends (NodeFs, Memory, AgenticStore, OPFS, LocalStorage, SQLite), (2) edge-cases: empty paths, special characters, unicode paths, concurrent writes (10+ files), race conditions on same-file writes. Reference existing test files for patterns.
